---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want
A clear description of the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Why
What problem does this solve? What's the use case? Who benefits?

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one seems better.

## Additional context
Mockups, references to similar features in other tools, related issues, etc.
